basics.name: Yuzhen (Amy) Song
basics.label: Undergraduate Researcher in Robotics
basics.summary: Robotics Engineering undergrad at SUSTech with a focus on UAV Trajectory Planning, SLAM, and Sim-to-Real deployment. Actively seeking Fall 2027 Ph.D. opportunities.

work.name: Southern University of Science and Technology
highlights: Deployed and evaluated the Fast-Planner framework in ROS for kinodynamic trajectory generation.
Constructed dense point-cloud benchmark environments to stress-test planner success rates in constrained scenarios.

work.name: Southern University of Science and Technology
highlights: Architected a full-stack mobile manipulator in ROS 2, integrating SLAM Toolbox, Nav2, and MoveIt 2.
Implemented an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) to fuse IMU and wheel odometry for robust state estimation.
Developed multi-modal HRI with MediaPipe for gesture control and Vosk for offline voice commands.

work.name: Southern University of Science and Technology
highlights: Established robust simulation environments in NVIDIA Isaac Sim and Webots for RL policy training.
Refined URDF models and optimized closed-loop kinematic constraints to ensure high-fidelity physics simulation.

work.name: Southern University of Science and Technology
highlights: Developed an STM32-based embedded control architecture for high-fidelity motor torque/speed regulation.
Achieved an estimated 20-30% reduction in metabolic cost via optimized dynamic traction assistance.

projects.name: CV-Guided 6-DOF Robotic Sketching
highlights: Developed an OpenCV vision pipeline and Euclidean search algorithm for optimal continuous toolpaths.
Solved 6-DOF inverse kinematics (IK) via D-H parameters for high-precision physical sketching.

projects.name: Autonomous Intelligent Rescue Vehicle
highlights: Programmed an STM32 Finite State Machine (FSM) for chassis kinematics and PWM-based servo grasping.
Trained and deployed a custom YOLOv11 object detection model for robust real-time multi-class recognition.

education.institution: Southern University of Science and Technology
courses: Core Competencies: ROS/ROS2, SLAM, Autonomous Navigation, Motion Planning, Computer Vision

awards.title: National Second Prize, China Undergraduate Eng. Practice and Innovation Ability Competition
Provincial First Prize, Guangdong Undergraduate Eng. Practice and Innovation Ability Competition
